name: threejs
description: Three.js 3D graphics guidance for scenes, geometry, materials, shaders, lighting, animation, interaction, loaders, textures, and post-processing.

interface.shortDescription: Three.js 3D graphics library guidance for the web.
interface.longDescription: Complete Three.js guidance covering scene setup, geometry, materials (PBR, standard, shader), shaders (GLSL, WGSL), lighting, shadows, animation, interaction (raycasting, controls), model loaders (glTF, FBX, OBJ), textures, post-processing, and render pipeline optimization.
defaultPrompt: Set up a Three.js scene with a perspective camera, a WebGLRenderer with shadows and tone mapping enabled, and multiple light sources including directional and ambient lights.
Create a MeshStandardMaterial with albedo, normal, roughness, and metalness texture maps applied to a glTF model loaded via GLTFLoader.
Add an EffectComposer with an UnrealBloomPass for emissive glow and a tone mapping pass for HDR rendering.
